message:
style(html_export): apply rustfmt 2026 method-chain layout to scripts.rs tests

Cargo fmt reflows three multi-line assert!(bundle.inline_js.contains(...))
chains in src/html_export/scripts.rs tests. The new layout puts the
chain on its own indented block:

    assert!(
        bundle
            .inline_js
            .contains("...")
    );

instead of the older form where `assert!(bundle\n    .inline_js\n    .contains(...))`
sat partly on the assert! line. No content or assertion semantics
change.

This catches the file up to whatever rustfmt edition / config knob
flipped recently in this repo's toolchain so `cargo fmt --check`
stays clean.
